'''yatumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niche|niche]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niche|niche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yatumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætimith|yætimith]] || [[word:yætimij|yætimij]] || [[word:yætimish|yætimish]] || [[word:yætimi|yætimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatutumuth|yatutumuth]] || [[word:yatutumuj|yatutumuj]] || [[word:yatutumush|yatutumush]] || [[word:yatutumu|yatutumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatumuth|yatumuth]] || [[word:yatumuj|yatumuj]] || [[word:yatumush|yatumush]] || [[word:yatumu|yatumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatufmuth|yatufmuth]] || [[word:yatufmuj|yatufmuj]] || [[word:yatufmush|yatufmush]] || [[word:yatufmuf|yatufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatumuthu|yatumuthu]] || [[word:yatumuju|yatumuju]] || [[word:yatumushu|yatumushu]] || [[word:yatumuku|yatumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatumuth|yatumuth]] || [[word:yatumuj|yatumuj]] || [[word:yatumush|yatumush]] || [[word:yatumu|yatumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatumuthul|yatumuthul]] || [[word:yatumujul|yatumujul]] || [[word:yatumushul|yatumushul]] || [[word:yatumukul|yatumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatumuthuthu|yatumuthuthu]] || [[word:yatumujuju|yatumujuju]] || [[word:yatumushushu|yatumushushu]] || [[word:yatumuku|yatumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatumuthun|yatumuthun]] || [[word:yatumujun|yatumujun]] || [[word:yatumushun|yatumushun]] || [[word:yatumukun|yatumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatumuthuoro|yatumuthuoro]] || [[word:yatumujuoro|yatumujuoro]] || [[word:yatumushuoro|yatumushuoro]] || [[word:yatumukuoro|yatumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
